pattern: Scan adjacent characters and count transitions where the case-insensitive letter actually changes.
hints: Modifiers do not matter, so compare letters ignoring case.
Walk the string once and look at each character against the previous one.
Lowercase both the current and previous character; increment a counter whenever they differ.

edge_inputs.description: alternating case but only letter changes count
only one letter typed in mixed case is zero changes
same lowercase letter repeated is zero
case toggles within a run still no change

stress.description: long random mixed-case string over a few letters
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100))
    letters = 'aAbBcC'
    return [''.join(rng.choice(letters) for _ in range(n))]
